name: Apci
description_short: APCI Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit institution offering auto loans, mortgages, credit cards, and savings products with competitive rates.
description_long:
APCI Federal Credit Union operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration). The organization provides comprehensive banking solutions designed for everyday consumer needs, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional for-profit banks.

The credit union offers a diverse product suite including auto loans (3.99% APR advertised), refinance mortgages (6.08% APR), home equity loans (5.49% APR), credit cards (Mastercard Plus at 11.90% APR), student loan refinancing through LendKey partnership, rental real estate loans, certificates of deposit (3.80% APY for 3-month terms), and youth savings accounts. Members access services through online eBanking, mobile platforms, and phone support at 800-821-5104. The organization actively promotes membership referrals with $25 incentives and maintains financial literacy programming.

APCI differentiates itself through member benefits typical of credit unions: non-profit structure meaning profits return to members, specialized loan products like rental real estate financing, partnership with LendKey for student loan refinancing, and community engagement through youth accounts and financial education. The institution hosted a 2026 Annual Meeting and maintains active social media presence on Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn.

As a credit union, APCI serves member-owners rather than shareholders, which theoretically translates to lower fees and competitive rates. However, membership eligibility requirements typically apply, and the website provides limited detail on approval standards, specific fees, or comprehensive product terms. The advertised rates represent minimums and require qualification.
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 3.99% APR for new vehicles
Non-profit credit union structure returns profits to member-owners
Student loan refinancing available through LendKey partnership
Specialized rental real estate loan product for investment properties
Member referral program offering $25 rewards for new memberships
Youth savings accounts with $5 deposit incentive for members 18 and under
Online eBanking platform for convenient account management
cons: Limited transparency on membership eligibility requirements and application process
No detailed fee schedule provided on website for accounts or services
Advertised rates are minimums requiring qualification; actual rates vary
Website lacks comprehensive information on loan approval timelines or requirements
No clear disclosure of account minimums, overdraft policies, or service limitations
best_for: Individuals seeking competitive auto and mortgage refinancing rates through a member-owned institution
Parents opening youth savings accounts for children under 18
Real estate investors looking for specialized rental property financing
diagnosis: APCI Federal Credit Union is best for member-owners seeking competitive rates on auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards with the advantage of non-profit structure. The main caveat is that membership eligibility requirements apply, specific terms and fees are not fully disclosed on the website, and advertised rates represent minimums requiring qualification.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.

meta_description: Apci — NCUA-insured credit union in Lehigh Valley, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
